Motorbike Stunt Simulator

Motorbike Stunt Simulator is a free 3D motorcycle game where you can explore dynamic stunt maps and perform the craziest and impossible tricks with your motorbike. Choose from four exciting stunt arenas, each filled with ramps, loops, obstacles or challenging courses. Master your bike's controls and rack up your stunt score by nailing the craziest flips, spins, and jumps. Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Drive the bikeSpacebar: HandbrakeShift: Activate boostC: Switch camera viewsR: Reset sceneG: Reset your bikeE: Turn on police lightsX: Hide instructionsTab: Return to main menu Tip: Want to switch bikes?

Play Motorbike Stunt Simulator Online

Loading game...
About Motorbike Stunt Simulator

Motorbike Stunt Simulator is a free 3D motorcycle game where you can explore dynamic stunt maps and perform the craziest and impossible tricks with your motorbike. Choose from four exciting stunt arenas, each filled with ramps, loops, obstacles or challenging courses. Master your bike's controls and rack up your stunt score by nailing the craziest flips, spins, and jumps. Controls WASD / Arrow Keys: Drive the bikeSpacebar: HandbrakeShift: Activate boostC: Switch camera viewsR: Reset sceneG: Reset your bikeE: Turn on police lightsX: Hide instructionsTab: Return to main menu Tip: Want to switch bikes? This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Motorbike Stunt Simulator in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Crazy game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Motorbike Stunt Simulator for free?

Yes. Motorbike Stunt Simulator is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Motorbike Stunt Simulator?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
